nasb.text: Then David said to Abigail, “Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, who sent you this day to meet me,

esv.text: And David said to Abigail, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, who sent you this day to meet me!

cnv.text: 大衛對亞比該說：“耶和華以色列的　神是應當稱頌的！他今天差派你來迎接我。

ccb.text: 大卫对亚比该说：“以色列的上帝耶和华当受称颂！祂今天派你来见我。
